nasb.text: Now, O Lord our God, I pray, deliver us from his hand that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that You alone, O Lord, are God.”

esv.text: So now, O Lord our God, save us, please, from his hand, that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that you, O Lord, are God alone.”

cnv.text: 現在，耶和華我們的　神啊，求你從他的手中把我們拯救出來，地上萬國就可以知道只有你耶和華才是　神。”

ccb.text: 我们的上帝耶和华啊，现在求你从亚述王手中拯救我们，让天下万国都知道唯有你是耶和华。”
